description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a combination of dark metal and wood components, reminiscent of the AK-47 design. The stock and handguard are made of wood, displaying a natural brown grain, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from blackened metal. The rifle features a fixed wooden stock, a curved detachable box magazine, and standard iron sights mounted along the top. The barrel is long and slender, ending with a simple muzzle device. The overall build is robust, with visible screws and mechanical details, suitable for rugged urban environments.
description: A robust, dark metal and wood assault rifle with a fixed wooden stock, curved magazine, and standard iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
